# OT Transport

> Ontario's last mile delivery specialists. Commercial box truck freight across the Greater Toronto Area, Durham Region, and all of Ontario. 24/7 dispatch for businesses that can't afford delays.

OT Transport is a commercial freight company based in Ontario, Canada, specializing in last mile delivery — the critical final leg from distribution centres to the end destination. We serve B2B clients who need reliable, trackable delivery with consistent drivers and no-excuses execution.

## Services

- **Last Mile Delivery** (our specialty): From distribution centres and warehouses to the final destination. Tracked, reliable, built for commercial volume. Available across all of Ontario.
- **Local Delivery**: Same-day and next-day box truck delivery within the Greater Toronto Area metro area.
- **Scheduled Routes**: Recurring delivery contracts for businesses with regular, predictable freight needs. Fixed pricing, consistent drivers, priority scheduling.
- **LTL Freight (Less-Than-Truckload)**: Pay only for the space your cargo occupies. Ideal for businesses that ship regularly but not in full-truckload volumes. Quoted by weight, volume, and distance.
- **Dedicated Fleet**: Reserved trucks and drivers exclusively for your operation. Suited for high-volume commercial clients who need guaranteed capacity.

## Service Area

Primary coverage: Greater Toronto Area and Durham Region
- Toronto, Scarborough, North York, Etobicoke
- Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, Courtice, Bowmanville
- Port Perry, Cobourg

Extended coverage: All of Ontario (long-haul routes available on request)

## Why OT Transport

- Last mile delivery is our core focus — not an afterthought
- 24/7 dispatch available for emergency and urgent shipments
- 2-business-hour response time on all quote requests
- Commercial B2B clients only — not household moves
- No long-term lock-in required for scheduled routes or dedicated fleet
- Cargo types: palletized goods, loose cargo, retail stock, construction materials, general B2B freight
- Does not handle hazardous materials or household moves

## Hours of Operation

Monday to Saturday: 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM (Eastern Time)
Emergency dispatch: 24/7

## Contact & Quotes

- Website: https://www.ottransport247.com/
- Email: ottransport247@gmail.com
- Quote form: https://www.ottransport247.com/#contact
- Response time: within 2 business hours (Mon–Sat)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What areas does OT Transport serve?**
OT Transport serves the Greater Toronto Area and Durham Region, including Toronto, Scarborough, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, Courtice, Bowmanville, Port Perry, and Cobourg, Ontario. Long-haul routes across Ontario are available on request.

**What types of freight does OT Transport haul?**
Commercial freight using box trucks: palletized goods, loose cargo, retail stock, construction materials, and general B2B freight. OT Transport does not handle household moves or hazardous materials.

**Does OT Transport offer same-day delivery?**
Yes. Same-day and next-day box truck delivery is available within the GTA metro area, subject to availability. 24/7 dispatch is available for urgent shipments.

**How does LTL freight pricing work?**
LTL pricing means you pay only for the space your cargo occupies in the truck. Quotes are based on weight, volume, and distance — ideal for businesses that ship regularly but don't fill a full truck.

**Can I set up a recurring route or dedicated fleet?**
Yes. OT Transport specializes in scheduled recurring routes and dedicated fleet contracts. These include fixed pricing, consistent drivers, and priority scheduling with no long-term lock-in required.

**How do I get a freight quote?**
Fill out the quote form at https://www.ottransport247.com/#contact or email ottransport247@gmail.com. All commercial freight inquiries receive a response within 2 business hours, Monday through Saturday.
